tasks.label: Setup: Install Everything
tasks.detail: Installs all MCP server dependencies and builds what's needed. Run this once after cloning.

tasks.label: Setup: Check Environment
tasks.detail: Verifies Node.js, npm, Azure CLI, and MCP servers are all ready — without installing anything.

tasks.label: Setup: Sign in to Azure
tasks.detail: Opens the Azure CLI login flow. You must be on VPN and use your Microsoft corp account.
